comment: Wave 4 Track B PR 4.B.3 baseline. The 5 entries in TRANSITIONAL_ALLOWLIST in packages/eslint-plugin-pryzm/src/rules/no-l7-direct-import.js are grandfathered until @pryzm/sdk (Phase F) ships and the plugins migrate away from L0-L5 direct imports. Increasing this count requires explicit architectural approval and a ratchet PR. No new entries allowed.
